chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3678 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ مَرَّ بِبَسَاتِينَ فَلاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ يَأْكُلَ مِنْ ثِمَارِهَا وَ لاَ يَحْمِلْ مَعَهُ مِنْهَا شَيْئاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3678 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever passes by orchards, there is no harm in eating from their fruits, but he should not carry anything from them with him."
